name: kitp-web
description: kitp web client — zero-framework, signal/control, esbuild-only.

comments.toolchain: esbuild is the SOLE build/dev dependency. No Svelte, Vite, Tailwind, React, vitest, or jest. Type-checking is via `tsc --noEmit` (typescript provided ambiently / by editor) as the type oracle; esbuild does emit only.
comments.runtime-deps: dompurify + marked are the markdown/XSS boundary and are VENDORED under web/vendor/ as ESM (web/vendor/dompurify.js, web/vendor/marked.js). esbuild bundles them from those relative imports — they are NOT installed as npm dependencies and add no runtime/build toolchain dep. The single consumer is src/util/markdown.ts.
comments.tests: node --test runs test/*.test.mjs (esbuild-built on the fly). Dependency-light: no test framework. jsdom is a TEST-ONLY devDependency: DOMPurify needs a real DOM (DOMParser/template/node-iterator) that Node has no built-in for, so the markdown sanitization test installs a jsdom window before importing the module under test. jsdom is never bundled into dist and is not part of the build/dev-server path.
